description_long: This is a modern athletic slip-on shoe featuring a streamlined silhouette and a predominantly black and dark gray color scheme. The upper is constructed from a combination of mesh and synthetic overlays, providing breathability and structural support. The shoe lacks traditional laces, instead utilizing a seamless vamp with perforations for ventilation and a pull tab at the heel for easy on and off. The midsole is slightly elevated and appears to be made of lightweight foam, while the outsole has a rugged, grippy tread suitable for urban environments. Branding elements are visible on the lateral side and tongue, with a geometric logo and subtle text. The overall design is sleek, functional, and intended for active use in city settings.
description: A sleek, black and gray slip-on athletic shoe with mesh and synthetic overlays, featuring a rugged sole and geometric branding. Designed for comfort and performance in urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the shoe's streamlined profile, mesh upper, synthetic overlays, and pull tab at the heel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel structure, pull tab, and the textured outsole extending slightly up the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the geometric logo, mesh and synthetic paneling, and the shoe's overall low-cut design.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the seamless vamp, perforated upper, and the subtle logo on the tongue.
attribute_logo: Triangular Reebok logo on the lateral side and a smaller version on the tongue, both in gray.
